name: VeloMemberInvitation
description: Member invitations for onboarding new users to the platform

email.description: Email address of the invited member

status.description: Invitation status (sent, pending, accepted, expired, revoked)

token_hint.description: A safe reference code for the invitation link

invited_by_email.description: Email of the admin who sent the invite

sent_at.description: Timestamp when the invite was sent

accepted_at.description: Timestamp when the invite was accepted

revoked_at.description: Timestamp when the invite was revoked

resend_count.description: Number of times the invite has been resent

workspace_status.description: Status of the user's workspace creation (pending, created)
